HomeDestinationsSamsing
West Bengal

Samsing

The Valley of Oranges and Rivers

Turquoise river winding through dense forest, the valley echoing with the music of rushing water.

4.3
(102 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
20°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Samsing is a scenic valley surrounded by tea gardens, orange orchards, and the meandering Neora River. A paradise for birdwatchers.

History

A former tea plantation area that has transformed into a biodiversity hotspot and eco-tourism destination.

Altitude

1,500 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Neora Valley National Park

Rich biodiversity with red pandas and clouded leopards.

Heritage

Samsing Tea Garden

Picturesque tea garden with factory visits.

KuboVista

Lava Jamunae

A hidden waterfall in the forest.

Why visit: Secluded and pristine

Viewpoints

sunset

Sunset Point Samsing

Sunset over the orange orchards.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Orange Grove Restaurant

4.2

Local & Continental • ₹300-500

Surrounded by orange trees.

Cafes

River Cafe

4.1

Specialty: Fresh Juice

Fresh orange juice and snacks by the river.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Orange Market

Fresh oranges and local produce.

Organic orangesLocal honeyTea

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Birdwatching Tour

Easy

Spot rare Himalayan birds.

4 hrs
₹1,000

River Trekking

Moderate

Trek along the Neora River.

5 hrs
₹1,500

Taxi
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
